{{CargoRelic
|name=Antimatter Bomb
|class_id=21804
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=08-10
|source=
|description=On Aug 10, 2070 AD, the world's most powerful explosive was invented.<br>This bomb is a weapon of mass destruction based on antimatter technology. 100% of the mass is converted into energy when the fundamental particle collides with the antiparticles. According to the mass-energy formula, it's calculated that the energy released by just a few grams of antimatter is enough to destroy the earth. However, although antimatter bombs theoretically are capable of massive destruction, there are still some insurmountable challenges.
|fame=58
|art=68
|fth=80
|civ=48
|tech=108
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +20<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +20<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +25<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +25<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +35<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +35<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +45<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +45<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +60<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +60<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +60<br>Per 10 Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +60<br>Apostles Dominated: 200/200<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop DMG toward heroes +6%
|skill2=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +9%
|skill3=[[File:Goldfish skill III.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop All ELMT DMG +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Annihilation|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Refine Speedup, +28800|orange}}
|3name=Antimatter Gunpowder|3rec=6.74M|3atk=66573|3defense=43916|3hp=1328016|3weak=12429
|4name=Antimatter Fuse|4rec=11.95M|4atk=90685|4defense=59822|4hp=2308535|4weak=14913
|5name=Antimatter Detonator|5rec=24.76M|5atk=119348|5defense=78730|5hp=3804247|5weak=18082
|6name=Antimatter Match|6rec=40.35M|6atk=152611|6defense=100672|6hp=6066110|6weak=19354
|Arec=59.06M|Aatk=192500|Adefense=126986|Ahp=9334242|Aweak=21613
}}}}
